description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure features large, rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facades, maximizing natural light. The front includes a covered driveway and carport, with a visible porch area and a small garden. The property is enclosed by a low wall, and the grounds include a detached shed and paved walkways. The exterior is primarily white with gray accents, and the roof has multiple levels and terraces. The overall design emphasizes open space, minimalism, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a carport, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, porch, and garden features.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the main entrance with visible porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, terrace, and the detached shed within the enclosed yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shed, rear terrace, and more of the garden and paved walkways.
